rationale: The revision only adds execution metadata and does not implement the required impact-matrix or proposed-policy code changes, so the acceptance criteria cannot be satisfied.

findings.summary: The required five-operation impact matrix update is absent; there is no change to IMPACT_MATRIX_OPERATIONS to add create and update.
The policies page does not add the proposedImpactMatrix, proposedImpactMatrixError, or loadingProposedImpactMatrix state, nor the required reset/fetch logic for proposed-policy loading.

The diff contains only an execution result file, so there is no implementation evidence for the optional policyOverride API support, the second Promise.allSettled flow, or any verification for lint/typecheck/e2e acceptance criteria.
